title: VoteReceipt
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 15.4. Owned by voting-service (epd2_voting_service.domain.VoteReceipt). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing vote-linkability control (CT-00-09, canon section 15.3's 'Запрет', which applies to VoteReceipt exactly as it does to VoteEnvelope): account_id, person_id, identity_record_id, full_name, email, membership_id, and identity_provider_reference are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema. `receipt_hash` is built only from the referenced VoteEnvelope's own vote_envelope_id/integrity_hash - never from encrypted_or_encoded_choice - so a receipt proves inclusion without revealing the chosen option (epd2_voting_service.domain.compute_vote_receipt_hash).
